note: Code corrected to the paper (reward 0.34/0.33/0.33, 5 hidden layers, N=2000) and training strengthened (GAE advantages, entropy bonus to prevent policy collapse, load-balance log floor). A full retrain on the larger real trace with these fixes is in progress; the eval table (PF-MPPO vs HEFT/Min-Min/Greedy/Random) is written here by benchmarks/b1_scheduler/eval_pfmppo.py once the retrained model is committed.

dataset.note: documented substitution of one real production trace for another

paper_reported_results.source: PF-MPPO, Future Generation Computer Systems, Elsevier 2025
